Because user wants me to tell them a joke. Let me think of a good one... Oct 31 = Dec 25! 🎃🎄

Ha! Get it? Because octal 31 equals decimal 25. Yeah, it's a programmer joke. *hits hand on table*

Got any other questions, or you just testing out the vibe here?
